title: Warm & beachy week — rank's live finalists
intro: Rank's own cut from a live run of the leg-intent engine: two cheap Honolulu round trips — one split Alaska and American, one all-Alaska — plus its one notable stretch, an all-business round trip on Boeing 777-300ER metal that clears your cabin preference and pays with a risky-short Los Angeles connection. Every ranked finalist misses business on both legs; the stretch is the one that clears it. Pick one to book, several to compare, or leave a note under any card.

submit.label: Send my pick
submit.note: Several picks and I verify and compare them; one pick and I go straight to the booking sheet.

blocks.md: Swept Alaska, American, Aeroplan, and 25 more across Aug 30 – Oct 4 — soft dates padded seven days past your Sep 6 window, because the near-misses won on price. Both balances cover every ranked option outright. Availability last read 2 hours ago; each card carries its own freshness stamp.

blocks.title: 1 · Honolulu — 62,000 miles (Alaska + American), Aug 31 out, Sep 6 home to PHX
blocks.summary: Cheapest mix. Nonstop each way; economy out, premium economy home.

children.md:
**Judgment** — the run's verdicts for this journey:
- ✅ **Affordability** — 12,500 Alaska + 49,500 American miles; both balances cover.
- ℹ️ **Layovers** — neutral both directions: nonstop, no connection to weigh.
- ⚠️ **Cabin** — economy out, premium economy home; both legs below your business preference.

blocks.title: 2 · Honolulu — 25,000 miles (Alaska), Sep 1 out, Sep 9 home to SAN
blocks.summary: Fewest miles, all Alaska; economy both ways, two nights past your seven-night target.

children.md:
**Judgment** — the run's verdicts for this journey:
- ✅ **Affordability** — 25,000 Alaska miles round trip; balance covers.
- ℹ️ **Layovers** — neutral both directions: nonstop, no connection to weigh.
- ⚠️ **Trip length** — +2 days past your seven-night target.
- ⚠️ **Cabin** — economy both ways; below your business preference.

blocks.title: 3 · Stretch · Honolulu all-business — 70,000 Alaska miles, San Diego round trip via Los Angeles
blocks.summary: The one finalist that clears business — Boeing 777-300ER on both transpacific legs; pays with a risky-short Los Angeles connection out.

**Why it boarded** — the run's note verbatim: "clears your business cabin preference — every ranked finalist misses it."

**Judgment** — the run's verdicts for this journey:
- ✅ **Affordability** — 70,000 Alaska miles; your balance covers.
- ✅ **Seat** — Boeing 777-300ER business (registry: solid) on both transpacific legs.
- ⚠️ **Layovers** — demote: "Risky-short 45-min LAX connection out — 30 min under your 75-min floor."

blocks.md: **Unpaired leads.** Kona (KOA) surfaced a 30,000-mile Alaska business outbound but no business return in the window; the return searched 2 hours ago and came back `searched_empty`. A lead, not a verdict — an expired empty reads unverified, never "no space". Say the word and I recheck it live.
